problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Fear. Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
